case_title: CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/DEPT.OF PUBLIC WORKS VS DIABLO CONTRACTOR'S INC./GEN.ENGINEERING CONTRAC -

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/DEPT.OF PUBLIC WORKS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIABLO CONTRACTOR'S INC./GEN.ENGINEERING CONTRAC - EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COST. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 25482 ON 6-11-98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/DEPT.OF PUBLIC WORKS AS TO DEFENDANT DIABLO CONTRACTOR'S INC./GEN.ENGINEERING CONTRAC - ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY&COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/DEPT.OF PUBLIC WORKS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIABLO CONTRACTOR'S INC./GEN.ENGINEERING CONTRAC - $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $61.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,061.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEALS FORM MAILED TO DEF.PER WRITTEN REQUEST. ALSO MAILED BOOKLET.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT DIABLO CONTRACTOR'S INC./GEN.ENGINEERING CONTRAC -
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIABLO CONTRACTOR'S INC./GEN.ENGINEERING CONTRAC -
COPY OF JUDGMENT REMAILED TO PLTFF.(ATTENTION: MS. DOUGHTY).
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 25482, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
